title: Korean-Style Steamed Egg
description: A simple and comforting Korean-style steamed egg dish. Perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Crack the eggs into the bowl.
Whisk the eggs together until well combined.
Add a pinch of salt to the eggs.
Pour the egg mixture into a heatproof bowl.
Place the bowl over boiling water, making sure the bottom is not touching the water.
Cover the bowl with a lid or plastic wrap.
Steam the eggs for 12-15 minutes, or until they are set.
Remove the bowl from the heat and let the eggs cool slightly.
Serve the steamed egg hot, garnished with a sprinkle of salt if desired.
